Welcome to the reality. It sucks. I don't love it. NEVER.

Man is not born free. We cannot choose whether we are thrown into this world or not. And everywhere we are in chains.

For ordinary human beings they don't wanna be alienated. Fear of being abandoned is part of human nature. This is the initial set up just like we breathe so as to stay alive.

Since we born we begin being brainwashed.

Why do human beings have to take responsibilities for something we don't have the right to choose? It's not us who determine to be one in this world.

We are taught to enter school, seek a job to earn a living... and the ending everyone has is DEATH.

If you don't obey this rule, confront against everyone forces you to obey it, or even violate it,
you will be considered as abnormal.
No you never actually do harm to others, but they will start together harming you by blaming you for being irresponsible as a human being.
My English proficiency worsens a lot since I left school last year.
